TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: u ŚéüśįĎśúÉ ayda a mihcan mududuc tu sapalekal tu kamu nu pinacadan a hulic, i waluway a bulad salingatu tu makakilul patiding I kanatal tuna nanaman tu kamu nu pinacadan, ay i 2018 a mihcan cacay a bataan a bulad tusa a demiad patideng tu payya a malinga tu, manamuh tayniyan nu maydihay padutus tu kamu nu pinacadan a tademaw milabu. caay kadayum pasubana' tu mamalasaydanay,u satabakiyay a panutekan palkal sa, a idaw ku ni paini tu kakitidaan minanam, micucuh pakaala mitaneng, sakala caygiya mala saydan, sapi cuduh tu idang nu palkalay tu kamu nu pinacadan, kya macalud matules ku sapasubana' tu kamu.
S.PHON: u *** ajda a mińß ¶an mududu ¶ tu sapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu kamu nu pina ¶adan a ńßur~…ĺi ¶, i war~…ĺuwaj a bur~…ĺad sar~…ĺiŇčatu tu makakir~…ĺur~…ĺ patidiŇč i kanatar~…ĺ tuna nanaman tu kamu nu pina ¶adan, aj i **** a mińß ¶an ¶a ¶aj a bataan a bur~…ĺad tusa a d…ômiad patid…ôŇč tu pajja a mar~…ĺiŇča tu, manamuńß tajnijan nu majdińßaj padutus tu kamu nu pina ¶adan a tad…ômaw mir~…ĺabu. ¶aaj kadajum pasubana Ē~ ° tu mamar~…ĺasajdanaj,u satabakijaj a panut…ôkan par~…ĺkar~…ĺ sa, a idaw ku ni paini tu kakitidaan minanam, mi ¶u ¶uńß pakaar~…ĺa mitan…ôŇč, sakar~…ĺa ¶ajgija mar~…ĺa sajdan, sapi ¶uduńß tu idaŇč nu par~…ĺkar~…ĺaj tu kamu nu pina ¶adan, kja ma ¶ar~…ĺud matur~…ĺ…ôs ku sapasubana Ē~ ° tu kamu.
S.FORM: u ŚéüśįĎśúÉ ayda a mihcan mududuc tu sapalekal tu kamu nu pinacadan a hulic, i waluway a bulad salingatu tu makakilul patiding I kanatal tuna nanaman tu kamu nu pinacadan, ay i 2018 a mihcan cacay a bataan a bulad tusa a demiad patideng tu payya a malinga tu, manamuh tayniyan nu maydihay padutus tu kamu nu pinacadan a tademaw milabu. caay kadayum pasubana' tu mamalasaydanay,u satabakiyay a panutekan palkal sa, a idaw ku ni paini tu kakitidaan minanam, micucuh pakaala mitaneng, sakala caygiya mala saydan, sapi cuduh tu idang nu palkalay tu kamu nu pinacadan, kya macalud matules ku sapasubana' tu kamu.
S.PHON: u *** ajda a mińß ¶an mududu ¶ tu sapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu kamu nu pina ¶adan a ńßur~…ĺi ¶, i war~…ĺuwaj a bur~…ĺad sar~…ĺiŇčatu tu makakir~…ĺur~…ĺ patidiŇč i kanatar~…ĺ tuna nanaman tu kamu nu pina ¶adan, aj i **** a mińß ¶an ¶a ¶aj a bataan a bur~…ĺad tusa a d…ômiad patid…ôŇč tu pajja a mar~…ĺiŇča tu, manamuńß tajnijan nu majdińßaj padutus tu kamu nu pina ¶adan a tad…ômaw mir~…ĺabu. ¶aaj kadajum pasubana Ē~ ° tu mamar~…ĺasajdanaj,u satabakijaj a panut…ôkan par~…ĺkar~…ĺ sa, a idaw ku ni paini tu kakitidaan minanam, mi ¶u ¶uńß pakaar~…ĺa mitan…ôŇč, sakar~…ĺa ¶ajgija mar~…ĺa sajdan, sapi ¶uduńß tu idaŇč nu par~…ĺkar~…ĺaj tu kamu nu pina ¶adan, kja ma ¶ar~…ĺud matur~…ĺ…ôs ku sapasubana Ē~ ° tu kamu.
